name: Solus
tagline: An independent, curated Linux for home computing
description: Solus is a fully independent Linux distribution — not based on Debian, Ubuntu, Arch, or Red Hat — developed from scratch with a focus on desktop usability and a curated, high-quality software selection. It is the home of the Budgie desktop environment, a modern panel-based desktop inspired by GNOME but lighter and faster. Solus uses its own eopkg package manager and follows a rolling release model with a strong emphasis on stability: updates are held and tested in a staging repository before reaching users. An excellent choice for those who want a polished daily driver without the Ubuntu ecosystem.
